Metadata.title: Inna | Creatorka — MAC Cards & Guidance
Metadata.description: Express MAC card reading, individual guidance and consultations

About.title: My path
About.item1: Master's degree in Marketing, 16 years in marketing and advertising — from sales manager to Commercial Director of a full-cycle advertising agency. This taught me how to create strong products and turn ideas into real, working projects.
About.item2: For over 10 years I've been exploring self-development and inner transformation. I saw firsthand how beliefs and convictions shape decisions and quality of life. That's why I combined marketing with tools for deep self-discovery.
About.item3: For 2 years, I've been creating original metaphorical associative cards and running individual and group sessions. I help experts and companies create transformational products and professionally package their expertise. When a person understands themselves — they manage life and business with ease.
About.conclusion: My strength — the fusion of deep self-discovery and strategic business thinking.

ExpressAnalysis.title: Your next step
ExpressAnalysis.subtitle: Focus • Resource • Action
ExpressAnalysis.intro: Sometimes one precise insight is enough to see the situation in a new light.
ExpressAnalysis.description: An online express reading with 3 metaphorical cards that will help you:
ExpressAnalysis.benefit1: understand what to focus on right now
ExpressAnalysis.step3: Receive a personal interpretation: Focus • Resource • Action

Services.title: Services
Services.heading: My services
Services.card1Feature1: Individual MAC session: Full immersion into your inquiry (relationships, self-realization, finances, etc.). Uncovering hidden patterns and creating a clear action plan.
Services.card1Feature2: Personal guidance to your goal: Comprehensive work (a series of sessions) to achieve a specific result. Support, state transformation, and methodological guidance at every stage.
Services.card2Feature1: Turnkey MAC concept creation: From idea and metaphor to a finished product.
Services.card2Feature2: Design & visualization (AI-assisted): Custom card decks, notebooks, books, and animations in your unique style.
Services.card2Feature3: Methodological support: Training on working with the tool and developing usage algorithms.
Services.card2Feature4: Implementation consulting: Assistance in launching your own product to market and integrating it into practice.
Services.card3Feature1: Corporate MAC sessions & reviews: Group work for resolving internal issues, stress relief, and finding solutions.
Services.card3Feature2: Custom branded tool development: Creating exclusive card decks and games for internal communications or partner gifts.
Services.card3Feature3: HR program integration: Using MAC in hiring, onboarding, and assessing employee emotional well-being.
Services.card3Feature4: Innovative trainings & workshops: Teaching teams creative thinking through metaphorical tools.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Answers to everything you're curious about
FAQ.q1: What are MAC cards and how do they work?
FAQ.a1: MAC (metaphorical associative cards) are a tool for working with the subconscious through imagery. You intuitively choose cards, and I help interpret their meaning in the context of your inquiry. This is not fortune-telling — it's a structured methodology for self-discovery and decision-making.
FAQ.q2: How does the online express diagnostics work?
FAQ.a2: You pay for access, intuitively choose 3 cards online, and receive a personal interpretation across three dimensions: Focus, Resource, and Action. The whole process takes just a few minutes and is available from any device.
FAQ.a3: No. MAC is a scientifically grounded psychological tool that works with associations and metaphors. The cards help you see your situation from a new angle and find answers that are already within you.
FAQ.q4: What's the difference between express diagnostics and an individual session?
FAQ.a4: Express diagnostics is a quick online format with 3 cards for a specific question. An individual session is deeper one-on-one work where we explore your situation comprehensively using various card decks and techniques.
FAQ.q5: Do you work with companies and teams?
FAQ.a5: Yes! I conduct group MAC sessions for teams, create custom branded tools, integrate methodology into HR programs, and run trainings and workshops. Methodology licensing is also available.
FAQ.a6: Payment is made online through a secure payment system. After payment, you immediately get access to the selected service. If you have any questions about payment — reach out to me on Telegram or Instagram.

ExpressReading.title: Your next step
ExpressReading.subtitle: Focus • Resource • Action
ExpressReading.instruction: Take a deep breath and tune into the present moment. The cards will reveal a message for you right now. When you feel ready — choose three cards:
ExpressReading.step1: First card — Focus: what matters most for you to concentrate on right now
ExpressReading.step2: Second card — Resource: what you already have that will support you
ExpressReading.step3: Third card — Action: the specific step worth taking in the near future
